_comment: Applied via PATCH /indexes/jobs/settings before any documents are indexed. See packages/etl/src/index-meilisearch.ts
_searchableAttributes_comment: Order here is significance, not just a list. A query matching `title` outranks the same query only matching `description`. This directly implements the brief's requirement: 'C# developer' in the title ranks above C# only mentioned in the description.
_rankingRules_comment: Default Meilisearch order, with 'sort' inserted before 'exactness' so that when a query is present, relevance still wins first (words/typo/proximity/attribute), then explicit sort (listedAt desc) acts as a tiebreaker among equally-relevant results — matching 'newest first' without burying better title matches under merely-newer ones.
_typoTolerance_comment: Typo tolerance disabled specifically on the normalized symbol-terms — you do NOT want 'csharp' fuzzy-matching close to some other 4-letter-distance token and reintroducing the C#/C++ ambiguity we just fixed.
_faceting_comment: Powers the city filter's dropdown/autocomplete via the `city` facet distribution, without a separate DISTINCT query against Postgres.
